description: KV namespace definitions. Create with: wrangler kv:namespace create <name>

namespaces.name: cloudflare-manager-session-store
namespaces.purpose: Stores session data for site-auth worker

namespaces.name: cloudflare-manager-session-store-test
namespaces.purpose: Stores session data for site-auth worker (test environment). Create with: wrangler kv namespace create cloudflare-manager-session-store-test
